chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No.482 of 1987 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For Arguments 24.10.2024 Mr. Amjad Ali Advocate holds brief for Khawaja Shams-ul-Islam Advocate for the Plaitniff Aga Zafar Ahmed Advocate for the Defendant.-.-.-.-.-. The case diary reflects that very little or no interest has been shown in this case on behalf of the Plaintiff. Continuously adjournments have been sought by the learned counsel for the Plaintiff. Counsel holding brief today argues the delay is not on his part, however, the case diary reflects completely different story. It seems that learned counsel for the Plaintiff is not interested to proceed this matter, which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Amjad PS
